phase-scope.phase-35: Installer flow for operator-provided wildcard TLS certificate paths, validation, env wiring, and reusable deploy installation passed local/static checks; clean VPS wildcard TLS deploy remains operator-live.
phase-scope.phase-36: Installer/deploy flow collects Resend API key and sender settings so clean VPS registration can send verification emails; real Resend delivery remains operator-live.

commands.command-3: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_domain_tls_edge_static.py tests/test_mtproto_provisioning.py -v
commands.command-4: sh -c 'if [ -e .env ]; then DB_PASSWORD=phase35-compose-check docker compose config; else ln -s .env.example .env && trap "rm -f .env" EXIT && DB_PASSWORD=phase35-compose-check docker compose config; fi'
commands.command-5: python3 -m xml.etree.ElementTree docs/plans/Phase-35.xml docs/plans/Phase-36.xml docs/modules/M-048.xml docs/verification/V-M-048.xml docs/graph-index.xml docs/plan-index.xml docs/verification-index.xml && mygrace lint
commands.command-6: operator-live: prepared wildcard cert deploy on clean RU VPS, then HTTPS and MTProto-domain smoke with redacted evidence.
commands.command-8: operator-live: after Resend verifies krotpn.xyz, run one controlled-mailbox registration smoke with redacted evidence.

verification-levels.module-local: M-048 source smoke proves prompts, dynamic input validators, default paths, RU openssl bootstrap, remote certificate validation, production self-signed guard, safe cert install, deploy-generated MTProto secrets, Resend email env, and edge env wiring.
verification-levels.wave-level: M-012 bash syntax, docker compose config, and M-046 domain TLS static tests prove installer changes do not break deploy composition or existing edge settings.
verification-levels.phase-level: Operator-live smoke proves a clean VPS can consume prepared wildcard TLS material and serve public HTTPS without reissuing certificates.

module-checks.check-1: install.sh prompts for PUBLIC_DOMAIN, TLS_FULLCHAIN_PATH, and TLS_PRIVKEY_PATH after RU SSH connectivity is available.
module-checks.check-3: Domain and path inputs reject empty values, newlines, command substitution, shell metacharacters, and relative cert paths.
module-checks.check-4: Operator source certificate paths under /opt/KrotPN are rejected before clone can delete them.
module-checks.check-5: Installer remote preflight bootstraps openssl/ca-certificates on clean RU hosts when supported package managers are available.
module-checks.check-6: Remote validation rejects missing files, unreadable files, empty files, expired certs, mismatched cert/key pairs, and missing base-domain or wildcard SAN coverage.
module-checks.check-7: Cert/key match uses public-key fingerprints or equivalent non-secret output and never prints private-key material.
module-checks.check-8: deploy/deploy-on-server.sh installs validated cert material to /opt/KrotPN/ssl/server.crt and /opt/KrotPN/ssl/server.key with safe permissions.
module-checks.check-9: The deploy script aborts before docker compose changes when TLS validation fails.
module-checks.check-10: Production deploy does not silently generate self-signed certificates when operator wildcard TLS is expected.
module-checks.check-11: Generated .env uses the operator domain for DOMAIN, FRONTEND_URL, CORS origins, MTPROTO_BASE_DOMAIN, EDGE_PUBLIC_DOMAIN, EDGE_TLS_CERTIFICATE_PATH, EDGE_TLS_CERTIFICATE_KEY_PATH, and EDGE_TLS_CERTIFICATE_MODE.
module-checks.check-12: Generated .env includes deploy-created non-empty 32-hex MTPROTO_BASE_SECRET_HEX and MTPROTO_SECRET_SALT values without printing them.
module-checks.check-13: Generated .env includes EMAIL_PROVIDER=resend, RESEND_API_KEY, RESEND_API_URL=https://api.resend.com/emails, EMAIL_FROM=noreply@krotpn.xyz, and EMAIL_VERIFICATION_URL_BASE for the selected domain.
module-checks.check-14: nginx canonical host, wildcard host, and mounted cert paths match the operator-selected domain and /etc/nginx/ssl/server.* contract.
module-checks.check-15: No verification output, installer logs, deploy logs, XML files, or smoke scripts print private key contents or Resend API key.
module-checks.check-16: Clean VPS smoke proves HTTP redirect, HTTPS frontend/API/admin, trusted cert chain, MTProto SNI readiness, and Resend-backed registration email delivery with prepared wildcard TLS.

verification-matrix.gate-1: Installer UX collects domain and certificate paths only after RU SSH connectivity can support remote validation.
verification-matrix.gate-2: Invalid certificate material fails closed before /opt/KrotPN/ssl replacement and before compose/service mutation.
verification-matrix.gate-3: Validated wildcard TLS is wired to backend/frontend/admin edge env and nginx cert mount paths.
verification-matrix.gate-4: Secret-bearing material is never printed or embedded in verification artifacts.
verification-matrix.gate-5: Prepared wildcard TLS supports public HTTPS and leaves MTProto shared-443 proof under the existing live gate.
verification-matrix.gate-6: Installer/deploy Resend env wiring is sufficient for backend Settings to enable email provider delivery.
verification-matrix.gate-7: Clean VPS registration sends a verification email through Resend after the domain is verified.

scenarios.scenario-1: Operator places /root/krotpn-ssl/fullchain1.pem and /root/krotpn-ssl/privkey1.pem on RU, accepts default krotpn.xyz prompts, and deploy completes with trusted TLS paths.
scenarios.scenario-2: Operator reruns install with the same valid cert paths and the deploy preserves or atomically refreshes TLS material without reissuing certificates.
scenarios.scenario-3: Operator enters a non-default production domain and the installer validates base-domain plus wildcard SAN coverage for that domain.
scenarios.scenario-4: Wrong file path or permission issue aborts before docker compose changes.
scenarios.scenario-5: Mismatched key, expired cert, or SAN mismatch aborts before replacing /opt/KrotPN/ssl files.
scenarios.scenario-6: Invalid domain/path input containing shell metacharacters is rejected before remote command construction.
scenarios.scenario-7: Self-signed fallback is unavailable in production mode unless explicitly selected for dev/test.
scenarios.scenario-8: A certificate source path under /opt/KrotPN is rejected because installer clone refreshes that directory.
scenarios.scenario-9: Blank MTProto secret env values must not make backend restart-loop; deploy should generate them and backend should treat blanks as missing config.
scenarios.scenario-10: Blank or missing Resend API key is rejected before clean deploy claims verified-registration email readiness.

redaction-rules.rule-1: Never print private key contents, certificate PEM bodies, .env secrets, RESEND_API_KEY, MTPROTO_BASE_SECRET_HEX, MTPROTO_SECRET_SALT, JWTs, refresh tokens, or email verification tokens.
redaction-rules.rule-2: Logs may include the domain, redacted paths, certificate issuer, notAfter date, and validation status.
redaction-rules.rule-3: Operator-live evidence must redact server passwords and should not include full shell traces around secret-handling commands.

telemetry-requirements.metric-1: installer_tls_validation_result tagged by reason without secret-bearing labels.
telemetry-requirements.metric-2: installer_tls_certificate_expiry_days logged as a bounded numeric value without PEM output.
telemetry-requirements.metric-3: deploy_tls_install_result tagged success, preserved, replaced, or aborted.
telemetry-requirements.metric-4: edge_domain_config_result tagged by canonical host only.
telemetry-requirements.metric-6: deploy_resend_config_result tagged configured, missing-key, invalid-sender, or redacted without API key value.

live-smoke-gates.gate-1: DNS for krotpn.xyz points to the target RU edge host.
live-smoke-gates.gate-2: Wildcard certificate files are present on RU before install starts.
live-smoke-gates.gate-3: Installer validation passes without printing private key contents.
live-smoke-gates.gate-4: openssl s_client or equivalent confirms the public certificate chain, issuer, SAN coverage, and expiry for the canonical host.
live-smoke-gates.gate-5: curl -I http://krotpn.xyz returns a redirect to https://krotpn.xyz.
live-smoke-gates.gate-6: HTTPS frontend, /api health, and /admin route respond with the trusted wildcard certificate.
live-smoke-gates.gate-7: One issued MTProto SNI under the wildcard domain is ready for the existing M-046/M-044 live smoke.
live-smoke-gates.gate-8: krotpn.xyz domain is verified in Resend and noreply@krotpn.xyz is accepted as the production sender.
live-smoke-gates.gate-9: A controlled mailbox receives one registration verification email and logs contain no Resend API key, verification token, or full verification URL.

failure-handoff.item-1: If local static smoke fails, fix installer/deploy contract drift before running any live VPS install.
failure-handoff.item-2: If remote cert validation fails live, preserve the existing /opt/KrotPN/ssl files and report the redacted failure reason.
failure-handoff.item-3: If public HTTPS smoke fails after deploy, roll back to the previous /opt/KrotPN/ssl files and nginx config before testing MTProto shared 443.
failure-handoff.item-4: If Resend rejects the key or sender, leave active user access unissued, preserve deployment state, and return an operator-safe provider configuration failure.

autonomous-execution-safety.safe-local: bash syntax checks, source static smoke, Phase-36 Resend deploy smoke, XML parse, and MyGRACE lint are safe locally.
autonomous-execution-safety.requires-operator: Real cert files, live DNS, clean VPS install, public HTTPS smoke, verified Resend domain, live mailbox receipt, and MTProto client proof require operator control.

evidence.evidence-4: 2026-05-17: docker compose config passed using local env handling; Docker reported only the existing obsolete version warning.
evidence.evidence-5: Operator-live clean VPS deploy with prepared wildcard cert files remains required before full production closure.
evidence.evidence-6: 2026-05-17: Reviewer follow-up added RU openssl bootstrap, /opt/KrotPN source-path rejection, and dynamic validator checks in scripts/phase35-installer-wildcard-tls-smoke.mjs.
evidence.evidence-7: 2026-05-17: Live clean VPS backend unhealthy failure fixed by generating MTProto secrets in deploy/deploy-on-server.sh and adding smoke guards against blank deploy values.
evidence.evidence-8: 2026-05-17: Phase-36 planning scoped Resend API key installer/deploy wiring after clean VPS registration hit Email provider is disabled.
evidence.evidence-9: 2026-05-17: Phase-36 verification design added Resend installer/deploy smoke, backend settings gate, and controlled-mailbox live gate.
evidence.evidence-10: 2026-05-17: Phase-36 local execution passed bash syntax and scripts/phase36-resend-deploy-smoke.mjs; live clean VPS Resend mailbox smoke remains blocked on operator API key and domain verification.
